title: FOOD PANTRIES - 211info
text: FISH FOOD BANK HOOD RIVER FOOD PANTRIES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a 3-5-day supply of emergency food. Pet food is sometimes available. Donations are accepted. 1130 Tucker Road Hood River, OR 97031 Eligibility: Low-income households Hours: Monday/Friday 3pm-5pm, Wednesday 9am-10am and 3pm-5:30pm Email (541) 386-3474 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers (541) 386-3474 Main phone Main phone (541) 386-3474 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, visit website, or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Hood River, Klickitat, Sherman, Skamania, and Wasco Counties (Mid-Columbia area) SITE HOURS: Monday/Friday 3pm-5pm, Wednesday 9am-10am and 3pm-5:30pm TRAVEL/LOCATION INFORMATION: Located beside the Spirit of Grace Church, directly accross from Orchard Lanes Bowling Alley Services: Animal Food/Supplies Donation Programs Food Donation Programs Food Pantries Pet Food If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
